title: Binary Tree Height
description: Given a binary tree encoded as parent array (0-indexed, root has parent -1), compute its height (number of edges on the longest root-to-leaf path).
inputSpec: First line: n. Second line: n integers p[0]..p[n-1] where p[i] is the parent of node i (-1 for root).

botCodes.code: let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let p=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let ch=Array.make n [] in let root=ref 0 in Array.iteri(fun i par->if par= -1 then root:=i else ch.(par)<-i::ch.(par))p;let rec h u=match ch.(u) with|[]->0|cs->1+List.fold_left(fun acc c->max acc(h c))0 cs in Printf.printf"%d\n"(h !root)
